title: lycium subglabrum
intro: Lycium subglabrum, also known as Chinese boxthorn, is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which are believed to have various health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Lycium subglabrum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and protect against certain types of cancer. Lycium subglabrum is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions.
